title: Weapons of War
description: A vanilla-friendly Weapon mod that aims to complement Vanilla's Combat System.
body:
# Insignia Belli

## Summary
A Vanilla Friendly Mod, that aims to add Weapons complimenting Vanilla's Combat System

## Ferrum Gravis
An Unenchantable Greatsword used for breaking shields, generally a Medium between Sword and Axe! This is gained by Crafting together Weapon Scraps* and a Netherite Sword.

## Weapon Scraps
Weapon Shards are a new Material found in Bastions, not in treasure Bastions they already have enough loot. 

_More to come_
